rows.description: Ganju possesses a hot temper, a strong ego and a deep hatred for Shinigami. This grudge is slow to dissipate even after he learns the truth of the incident. Though he always acts tough, he has shown that he also has a softer side, easily being cowed by his older sister Kūkaku.
rows.name: Ganju Shiba

rows.description: Izuru is a gloomy and introspective person, not easily able to socialize with others. He generally appears weak and indifferent, leading many to believe he lacks the ability to be a leader.
rows.name: Iziru Kira

rows.description: Ōmaeda is an arrogant and dull man. He is cowardly, loud, vain, elitist, snobbish, greedy and sluggish. However, he is exceedingly loyal to his captain to the point that he is willing to fight along with his captain against enemies much stronger than himself.
rows.name: Marechiyo Ōmaeda

rows.description: Yumichika is a narcissist who judges almost everyone and everything by beauty. He is also incredibly vain. Yumichika is a powerful combatant and wanted to become the third Seat of his Division, as he thought the kanji for the number three was the most beautiful.
rows.name: Yumichika Ayasegawa

rows.description: Lieutenant Kurotsuchi Nemu is an artificial entity created from the Gigai technology and Gikon technology by Captain Kurotsuchi. The same blood flows in Nemu and Captain Kurotsuchi, hence be it interest or how to spend free time, she will have many similarities as Captain Kurotsuchi.
rows.name: Nemu Kurotsuchi

rows.description: Sado is a quiet person and is sometimes the subject of jokes or bullies because he never fights back. Nonetheless, he is treated equally within his group of friends in Karakura.
rows.name: Yasutora Sado

rows.description: Kaien Shiba is the former lieutenant of the 13th Division, under Jūshirō Ukitake, up until his death at the hands of a Hollow that also killed his wife, Miyako Shiba. He was the brother of Kūkaku and Ganju.
rows.name: Kaien Shiba

rows.description: Orihime is independent, friendly, humorous, sensitive, caring and kind. She comes off as naive and rather clueless, which is at odds with her exceptionally high marks in school.
rows.name: Orihime Inoue

rows.description: Yachiru is childlike in most aspects - she is small, cheerful, energetic and carefree most of the time. She is often seen latched onto the back of her captain, Kenpachi Zaraki, just over his left shoulder and is somewhat territorial about this position.
rows.name: Yachiru Kusajishi

rows.description: Renji is quite dynamic. His personality varies from smug and cocky to disquieted and depressed after a major defeat, but shows himself to be an incredibly serious and determined fighter when confronted with an actual threat.
rows.name: Renji Abarai

rows.description: In comparison to her comrades, Lisa is one of the calmer, more sensible members of the Visored, showing a quite stern, detached and secretive demeanor at most points, although she is somewhat temperamental and easily irritable.
rows.name: Lisa Yadoumaru

rows.description: Initially born into a lower class, Rukia retains her modesty, even as an adopted member of the nobility. She is graceful and "clean", yet chooses to talk to ordinary people. However, her cool and lone demeanor often forces her to hide her personal troubles, even from her friends.
rows.name: Rukia Kuchiki

rows.description: Momo is generally an upbeat, easy-going, and friendly girl. She has a strong friendship with Tōshirō Hitsugaya, whom she grew up with, repeatedly calling him "Shirō-chan", despite his higher rank and complaints about this.
rows.name: Momo Hinamori

rows.description: Shinji is somewhat comical, adding a bit of levity to situations that are otherwise serious. He has a flippant attitude under normal circumstances and seems to like annoying his associate, Hiyori Sarugaki, which usually earns him a slap from one of her sandals.
rows.name: Visored Hirako

rows.description: Komamura is an anthropomorphic wolf, although he is often mistaken for a dog. Initially, he was very self-conscious about his appearance, so he wore gloves with bracers, as well as a helmet, to conceal his entire body.
rows.name: Komamura Sajin

rows.description: Kensei is a serious and decisive individual, though he is easily annoyed and is rather temperamental, often to a fault. He is greatly annoyed by immaturity, evident when Orihime infiltrates the Visored's hideout and jokingly asks where the bathroom is; Kensei is noticeably annoyed, only calming down when Lisa Yadōmaru and Love Aikawa remind him that it was only a joke
rows.name: Kensei Muguruma

rows.description: Harribel is calm, taciturn, level-headed, and analytical, preferring to not engage in combat: she is content with silently observing both parties until the fighting reaches its conclusion.
rows.name: Harribel

rows.description: Yoruichi is intelligent and witty, holding an intimate knowledge of Soul Society and its workings, as she was the former leader of the Onmitsukidō and the Second Division's captain. Although of noble birth, she acts differently from most other nobles, very much like Kaien Shiba.
rows.name: Shihōin Yoruichi

rows.description: Kisuke Urahara is the former captain of the 12th Division, as well as the founder and 1st President of the Shinigami Research and Development Institute. He currently lives in the Human World after being exiled, where he owns a small convenience store, "Urahara Shop", which doubles in selling Shinigami items.
rows.name: Kisuke Urahara

rows.description: Ikkaku is violent, fight-loving, and rude, which has been noted by Tetsuzaemon Iba, among others. He loves fighting so much, he is unwilling to travel anywhere without a sword, resorting to carrying a wooden one when posing as a student at Karakura High School.
rows.name: Ikkaku Madarame

rows.description: Tōsen has dark skin and dark brown braids. He has pupil-less eyes that are a pale lavender and has been blind since birth. He was the captain of the 9th Division of the Gotei 13 until he betrayed Soul Society, alongside Sōsuke Aizen and Gin Ichimaru.
rows.name: Kaname Tōsen

rows.description: Kyōraku is a laid-back and flamboyant man, evident in his style of dress and general attitude, and is rarely seen without a smile. In his off time, he often drinks sake in bars and naps. Other times, he likes to chase after women.
rows.name: Shunsui Kyōraku

rows.description: Ukitake is well-respected and highly honorable, and always treats those around him with respect, even those who are weaker or not as highly ranked as he is. As a result, he can be easily approached by other members of Soul Society who seek favors or advice from the captain.
rows.name: Jūshirō Ukitake

rows.description: Byakuya Kuchiki is the 28th head of the Kuchiki Clan, one of the four great noble clans in Soul Society. He is also the captain of the 6th Division in the Gotei 13, and his lieutenant is Renji Abarai.
rows.name: Byakuya Kuchiki

rows.description: Although he is known to be a violent fighter, Kenpachi's actions tend to be for the best. He has a very poor sense of direction, at times asking Yachiru for help (even though her sense of direction is just as bad). Kenpachi lives for battle, and enjoys a good fight more than anything.
rows.name: Kenpachi Zaraki

rows.description: Personality-wise, Nnoitra is extremely rude and lecherous, accented by his snake-like eyes and perverted attitude towards Orihime, rudely referring to her as "pet-sama".
rows.name: Nnoitra Gilga

rows.description: Retsu Unohana,formerly known as Yachiru Unohana, was the captain of the Fourth Division in the Gotei 13. She was one of the oldest and most experienced captains, and was the Soul Society's best healer, as well as the first person to wield the name Kenpachi.
rows.name: Retsu Unohana

rows.description: Baraggan has the appearance of an elderly man, with a white mustache and white hair. His face is lined by large scars on the left side of his chin and across his right eye. Despite his aged appearance, Baraggan is quite stocky and muscular.
rows.name: Baraggan Louisenbairn

rows.description: Gin Ichimaru was the captain of the 3rd Division of the Gotei 13 until he betrayed Soul Society. He is a very mysterious man, since his almost constant smile and slitted eyes, combined with his heavy use of sarcasm and mocking politeness, make it very difficult to discern his thoughts.
rows.name: Gin Ichimaru

rows.description: Suì-Fēng is the commander-in-chief of the Onmitsukidō and the captain of the 2nd Division in the Gotei 13.
rows.name: Suì-Fēng

rows.description: Starrk has blue-gray eyes and wavy, dark brown hair, which ends at the base of his neck, is always unkempt, and is parted down the middle. He has a faded goatee.
rows.name: Coyote Starrk

rows.description: Ichigo, who becomes Shinigami, wears the Hollowed Visor and greatly increases in battle capabilities.
rows.name: Hollowed Ichigo

rows.description: He followed his grandfather's footsteps and become a Quincy, very strong spiritual power.
rows.name: Quincy Uryū

rows.description: Sōsuke Aizen is the former captain of the 5th Division in the Gotei 13. He later leaves Soul Society with his followers, Gin Ichimaru and Kaname Tōsen. Prior to his departure from Soul Society, Aizen appeared as a mild-featured man with brown scholarly hair enhanced by square glasses, along with soft brown eyes.
rows.name: Sōsuke Aizen

rows.description: Rangiku tends to be a slacker who dislikes paperwork and loves to drink. She is not the slightest bit modest about her appearance, frequently referring or complaining about her large breasts in normal casual conversation, much to the embarrassment/amusement of anyone around at the time.
rows.name: Rangiku Matsumoto

rows.description: Nanao Ise is the co-lieutenant of the First Division of the Gotei 13, under Captain Shunsui Kyōraku, and Vice-President of the Shinigami Women's Association.
rows.name: Nanao Ise

rows.description: Ichigo wearing Christmas Clothes
rows.name: Christmas Ichigo

rows.description: Dark Rukia is a malicious, alternate form of Rukia Kuchiki, created when Rukia was forcibly merged with Homura and Shizuku. Being born from the siblings who erased all of Rukia's memories, Dark Rukia retains none of her former personality and instead seems to be dominated entirely by a fusion of Homura and Shizuku's consciousness.
rows.name: Dark Rukia

rows.description: Hitsugaya is generally mature and serious, in contrast to his free-spirited lieutenant, Rangiku Matsumoto. Despite their personality differences, he and Rangiku seem very close.He is relatively young by Shinigami standards, and has the appearance of a child.
rows.name: Tōshirō Hitsugaya

rows.description: Shinji Hirako is the captain of the 5th Division in the Gotei 13. He also served as a recruiter and the de facto leader of the Visored.
rows.name: Shinji Hirako

rows.description: The Shikai form of Renji. Zabimaru transforms into an even longer 6-part segmented blade; each segment is wider than the one preceding it from the hilt, with 2 pick-like protrusions on the front and back of each segment, with the ones on the front much longer than the ones on the back.
rows.name: Zabimaru Renji

rows.description: One of Ichigo's Zanpakutō, very powerful, hard to estimate capability.
rows.name: White Ichigo

rows.description: Gin Ichimaru was the captain of the 3rd Division of the Gotei 13 until he betrayed Soul Society. This is the Bankai form of Gin.
rows.name: Shinsō Gin

rows.description: Swimsuit Rengiku showcasing her sophisticated style
rows.name: Sophisticated Rengiku

rows.description: Swimsuit Nanao showcasing her smart style
rows.name: Smart Nanao

rows.description: Swimsuit Yoruichi showcasing her naturally sexy style
rows.name: Sexy Yoruichi

rows.description: Swimsuit Orihime Inoue has great figure yet extremely shy
rows.name: Cute Orihime

rows.description: Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez is an Arrancar and the Sexta (6th) Espada in Sōsuke Aizen's affiliated army. While appearing to be a laid-back individual, Grimmjow possesses a brutal, impulsive, and excessively violent personality alongside a lethally short temper.
rows.name: Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez

rows.description: Ulquiorra Cifer is the Cuatro (4th) Espada in Aizen's army of Arrancar. Ulquiorra is a very cold, callous, and dispassionate figure, and is rather aloof, brooding, and indifferent, willing to harm both his comrades and enemies should they get in his way.
rows.name: Ulquiorra

rows.description: Ikkaku is violent, fight-loving, and rude, which has been noted by Tetsuzaemon Iba, among others. He loves fighting so much, he is unwilling to travel anywhere without a sword, resorting to carrying a wooden one when posing as a student at Karakura High School.
rows.name: Ryūmon Ikkaku Madarame

rows.description: Grimmjow Jaegerjaquez is an Arrancar and the Sexta (6th) Espada in Sōsuke Aizen's affiliated army. While appearing to be a laid-back individual, Grimmjow possesses a brutal, impulsive, and excessively violent personality alongside a lethally short temper.
rows.name: Pantera Grimmjow

rows.description: She is also known as Nel Tu, and she is a small, good-natured, childlike Arrancar.
rows.name: Gamuza Nelliel Tu Odelschwanck

rows.description: Hitsugaya is generally mature and serious, in contrast to his free-spirited lieutenant, Rangiku Matsumoto. Despite their personality differences, he and Rangiku seem very close.He is relatively young by Shinigami standards, and has the appearance of a child.
rows.name: Daiguren Hyōrinmaru Hitsugaya

rows.description: Thousand Cherry Blossoms final status, Shūkei: Hakuteiken
rows.name: Hakuteiken Byakuya

rows.description: His appearance creates fear in his surrounding
rows.name: Shura Kenpachi

rows.description: Aizen after his plot is discovered
rows.name: Kyōka Suigetsu Aizen

rows.description: Ulquiorra's released form, with wings that help him move super fast
rows.name: Murciélago

rows.description: Ichigo Kurosaki's complete Hollowfication formed, but he maintained his goal of protecting others
rows.name: Demon Ichigo

rows.description: Ichigo Kurosaki is a Human who has Shinigami powers. He is also a Substitute Shinigami.
rows.name: Ichigo Kurosaki

rows.description: Ichigo Kurosaki is a Human who has Shinigami powers. He is also a Substitute Shinigami.
rows.name: Ichigo Kurosaki

rows.description: As a Shinigami, Yoruichi created Shunkō which combined with Utsusemi means she can deal high damage on enemy instantly.
rows.name: Shinigami Yoruichi

rows.description: As the Captain of Division 12th, Urahara first realized Aizen's plot and ran to real world to assist Ichigo.
rows.name: Shinigami Urahara

rows.description: Ichigo's father. He disguises himself as a civilian at other times, but indeed, he's a former Shinigami and his power even surpassed the captain of his division.
rows.name: Shin Isshin Kurosaki

rows.description: Ichigo's father. He disguises himself as a civilian at other times, but indeed, he's a former Shinigami and his power even surpassed the captain of his division.
rows.name: Isshin Kurosaki

rows.description: Genryūsai Shigekuni Yamamoto was the captain of the 1st Division in the Gotei 13 and also the Captain-Commander (Head-Captain in the English Dub) of the whole Gotei 13. His lieutenant was Chōjirō Sasakibe. He led the core of Gotei 13 to defeat Aizen and his arrancar army, in the process losing his left arm.
rows.name: Yamamoto Genryūsai Shigekuni

rows.description: Isane is a tall, young looking woman with gray eyes and short messy silver hair with strands on the right side of her face that are shoulder-length and styled as two thin braids. She wears a thin dangling red earring on each ear and a standard Shinigami uniform with her lieutenant badge on her left arm.
rows.name: Isane Kotetsu

rows.description: Kurotsuchi Mayuri is the 12th Division Captain of The Gotei 13 and the 2nd minister of technology R&D department. Besides, he is the author of medical column "cerebral tonic" of Seireitei communication set.
rows.name: Kurotsuchi Mayuri

rows.description: The ultimate form of Ichigo's zanpakuto which defeated Aizen.
rows.name: Mugetsu

rows.description: Before joining Gotei 13, she is the most fearsome villain in Soul Society. She named herself - Kenpachi.
rows.name: Retsu Unohana Kenpachi

rows.description: Ichigo in his Hogyoku-kai form, the heat and Reiatsu made Zangetsu a twin blade.
rows.name: True-Shikai Ichigo

rows.description: After Byakuya's incentive and reminder,Rukia determination to regain fighting,she successed to cast Bankai and defeat the enemy,the Bankai is called the Hakka no Togame.
rows.name: Bankai Rukia

rows.description: Silver short mid-parting hair, with a glass on his deep bluish eyes, he reminded people around of Ishida.
rows.name: Ishida Ryūken

rows.description: Renji with reddish blue hair and large tattoo above his eyebrow. Also there're similar tattoos on his body.
rows.name: Berserk Renji

rows.description: Shinigami Kensei is an irritable muscular man wearing a tank top.
rows.name: Shinigami Kensei

rows.description: Kirinji is a lean-built and very tall man with black hair arranged into an outlandishly large pompadour, or "regent" hairstyle, with tapered sideburns. He is frequently seen chewing upon a small stick. Instead of the standard Shinigami uniform, he wears a waist-length white jacket that leaves most of his chest exposed but still bears the Royal Guard emblem on its back, as well as the alternating circle and diamond pattern of a captain's haori along the bottom.
rows.name: Kirinji Tenjirō

rows.description: Yhwach is a tall man with long black hair and black beard. He has fierce appearance and reddish-brown eyes. He always wears a dark red cloak. Both sides of his coat have three silver medals.
rows.name: Yhwach

rows.description: Kirio Hikifune is a former captain of the 12th Division and a member of the Royal Guard, holding the title "Kokuō".
rows.name: Hikifune Kirio

rows.description: Nimaiya is a dark-skinned man with thick, black hair that is shaven and dyed green on the sides of his head. He wears a variation of the Shinigami shihakushō, featuring instead a green undergarment, and a shortened hakama that exposes his lower legs. Worn over this is a white, sleeveless puffer jacket that bears the Royal Guard emblem on its back, as well as the alternating circle and diamond pattern of a captain's haori along the bottom.
rows.name: Ōetsu Nimaiya

rows.description: Ichibē is a large and broad individual with a bald head, red eyes, bushy eyebrows and a long black beard. He wears the standard Shinigami uniform beneath a white, long-sleeved haori decorated with the Royal Guard's emblem.
rows.name: Ichibē Hyōsube

rows.description: Senjumaru has the appearance of a slender and very youthful woman with fair skin and long, black hair that is adorned at the back by a large golden ornament in the shape of a crescent moon with numerous small lines radiating outwards.
rows.name: Senjumaru Shutara

rows.description: He is a former 3rd Seat of the 6th Division who later revolted against the Seireitei. He was also a member of the Kuchiki Clan, having married into it.
rows.name: Kōga Kuchiki

rows.description: Kūkaku is youthful-looking woman of average height. She has green eyes and wears bandages over her long messy black hair that parts down in half at the small of her back.
rows.name: Sexy Kūkaku

rows.description: She is a woman of few words. She is slender, youthful and loyal to Kurotsuchi Mayuri.
rows.name: Shy Nemu

rows.description: Retsu Unohana is the captain of the Fourth Division in the Gotei 13. She is one of the oldest and most experienced captains.Unohana has the appearance of a slender and very youthful woman with blue eyes and black hair.
rows.name: Elegant Unohana

rows.description: Despite she's always timid and shy , her personality differs a lot when fighting.
rows.name: Noble Isane

rows.description: Toshiro is the captain of the 10th Division in the Gotei 13.He is relatively young by Shinigami standards, and has the appearance of a child.
rows.name: Handsome Toshiro

rows.description: Yachiru Kusajishi is the lieutenant of the 11th Division in the Gotei 13, under Captain Kenpachi Zaraki, as well as the President of the Shinigami Women's Association.
rows.name: Delicate Yachiru

rows.description: An emotional guy who used to thinking thoroughly and calmly.
rows.name: Gentle Byakuya

rows.description: Bambietta is a slender young girl with long, straight, dark brown hair and brown eyes. Her attire is a variation of the Sternritter's typical white uniform, consisting of the order's signature hooded-cloak, a thigh-length trench coat, knee-high boots, a miniskirt, and black stockings with a red trim on her gloves and boots.
rows.name: Bambietta Basterbine

rows.description: Youruichi under Shunko form, who acts with free will and releases totally different reiatsu that changes 48 times each second.
rows.name: Raijin Yoruichi

rows.description: After the grand war, Aizen, who was sealed at that time, was transferred to the Central 46 for an 18,800-year sentence. Then the duration was extended to 20,000 years due to his disdain to the law.
rows.name: Muken Aizen

rows.description: Jugram Haschwalth is a Quincy and the Wandenreich's Sternritter Grandmaster. He is also the advisor to Emperor Yhwach and the substitute as the monarch when Yhwach sleeps, as well as the second-in-command of the Wandenreich.[5] Yhwach refers to him as his "other half".
rows.name: Haschwalth

rows.description: We're devoured by the inevitable fear and ignorance, those who evaded are the chosen ones to fulfill the destiny.
rows.name: Bankai Urahara

rows.description: Komamura gives up his heart in exchange for his indestructible human form and Bankai via werewolf's Humanization Technique.
rows.name: Human Komamura

rows.description: Guided by Kusajishi, Kenpachi's skin turned red and became invulnerable by using his Bankai.
rows.name: Bankai Kenpachi

rows.description: In battle against Shihōin, Suì-Fēng has mastered Shunkō and continues to practice for perfection. Swirls of wind will circle around her till the end of fight.
rows.name: Shunkō Suì-Fēng

rows.description: Genryūsai, top Shinigami in a thousand year,  has mastered  Bankai Ryūjin Jakka: Zanka no Tachi. He can erase any enemies by a mere touch of  blade and cover himself with raging flame so no offender can come close to the sword holder. This is the most powerful Bankai.
rows.name: Bankai Genryūsai

rows.description: Shin Daiguren Tōshirō is the completed form of Tōshirō's Bankai power with mature look and shape. The unleashed Daiguren Hyōrinmaru can freeze everything to death in a few seconds.
rows.name: Shin Daiguren Tōshirō

rows.description: Bazz-B is a member of the Wandenreich's Sternritter, with the designation "H" - "The Heat", which means he can control fire in battle just like his hot-headed personality.  He keeps his purple hair in a long Mohawk and he is a friend of  Haschwalth since childhood.
rows.name: Bazz-B

rows.description: Gerard Valkyrie is a member of the Wandenreich's Sternritter with the designation "M" - The Miracle.  His body is resilient enough to recover from multiple fatal attack and this makes him the indestructible deity.
rows.name: Valkyrie

rows.description: The Captain-Commander of the Gotei 13. He lost his right eye in the battle with Wandenreich. Upon his Bankai Bones of Heavenly Blooming Madness·Withering Pine Lovers' Suicide release, an aura covers a large area around Shunsui. This aura changes others' perception of the surrounding environment, making them perceive it as darkened, bleak and gloomy, and causes others to feel varying levels of melancholy and despair. His Bankai includes four act, which is the most dramatic Bankai.
rows.name: Bankai Shunsui Kyōraku

rows.description: Empowered by the hell, Ichigo shields himself with golden armor, and he can release Golden Getsuga Tenshō with golden reiatsu. In this status, his speed and reiatsu are greatly enhanced.
rows.name: Hell Verse Ichigo

rows.description: A fallen Togaito who was eager for freedom again. Even Bankai Ichigo was no match for the powerful and speedy Kokutō.
rows.name: Kokutō

rows.description: Badly injured during Wandenreich's assault on Soul Society, Byakuya recovered under the care of Zero Division and became even more powerful.
rows.name: Blood War Byakuya

rows.description: Uryū Ishida betrayed his friends to join Yhwach's Schutzstaffel and become his successor, he received the same designation as Yhwach "A" - Antithesis
rows.name: Sternritter Uryū Ishida

rows.description: Askin is a member of the Wandenreich's Sternritter with the designation "D" - Deathdealing, one of the four members of Yhwach Fraccion, and he was the last member to be recognized by Yhwach.
rows.name: Askin

rows.description: A Fullbringer and the leader of the organization known as Xcution, he is also a former Substitute Shinigami. He, however, quits the position on purpose, hides in the Human world to summon Fullbringers to his camp, and signs the contract to collect power with the Xcution members so that they can use their power mutually.
rows.name: Kūgo Ginjō

rows.description: A Fullbringer and a former member of Xcution. Tsukishima is cold and collected in most things he does. His ability "Book of the End" can insert him into the target's past without hurting the opponent and change the target's memory.
rows.name: Shūkurō Tsukishima

rows.description: A Fullbringer and member of Xcution. Riruka is an impatient and hot-tempered young girl who loves donuts and cute things. She likes Ichigo.
rows.name: Riruka Dokugamine

rows.description: A Fullbringer and member of Xcution. He loves playing video games. Rarely talks, always use gaming terms when he does. Doesn’t get alomg with Riruka, always make fun of her actions. Yukio is smart, able to calmly solve sudden issues.
rows.name: Yukio Hans Vorarlberna

rows.description: Moe is a troublesome teenager with a mohawk hair style, he respects and worship Shūkurō Tsukishima. Efficient in hand-to-hand combat, but he has a weakness against beautiful girls.
rows.name: Moe Shishigawara

rows.description: With the help of XCUTION members, Ichigo utilize Substitute Shinigami Badge to release his Clad Type FullBring Form. In this form, he obtained amazing speed, and able to use Getsuga Tenshō against enemies.
rows.name: Fullbring Ichigo

rows.description: Mayuri is the 12th Division Captain in Gotei 13, 2nd President of the Shinigami Research Institutes. He has weird personality and personifies the stereotype of the mad scientist. In Royal Realm, he faught against Pernida Parnkgjas with Nemu Kurotsuchi.
rows.name: Blood War Mayuri

rows.description: Espada No.8, symbolize death by craziness. He has a pair of rectangular-framed glasses as his hollow mask, pink short hair with golden eyes. Most advanced scientist in hollow world, responsible for intel and data collection.
rows.name: Szayelaporro Granz

rows.description: Espada No.10, symbolize death by "Rage". He has a huge body, he can grow even bigger during battle with his rage because of that his spiritual and physical strength will also increase. He is the only Espada that will change his number when activate Resurrección. Just like his zanpakuto's name, Yammy's power came from his rage.
rows.name: Yammy Llargo

rows.description: Arrancar Espada Rank No. 6, Symbolize death by Destroy. Kurosaki Ichigo's old enemy. Near the end of Blood War, he helped Urahara Kisuke to defeat Askin.
rows.name: CFYOW Grimmjow

rows.description: Arrancar Espada Rank No.4, Symbolize death by Void. Kurosaki Ichigo's old enemy. After the death of Yhwach during Blood War, Aizen's Hogyoku divide itself, resurrect and power up the Espada's. They attack Seireitei and attempt to rescue Aizen.
rows.name: CFYOW Ulquiorra

rows.description: Former Arrancar Espada Rank No.3. A good friend of Kurosaki Ichigo. After the death of Yhwach during Blood War, hogyoku powered up Nelliel also. Luckily, she will be aiding Ichigo.
rows.name: CFYOW Nelliel

rows.description: Arrancar Espada Rank No.3, Symbolizes death by Sacrifice. De facto ruler of Hueco Mundo after Aizen's defeat. Following the death of Yhwach during Blood War, the Hogyoku powered up Harribel into a new form.
rows.name: CFYOW Harribel

rows.description: CFYOW version of Coyote Stark. A Vanguard who fights with Los Lobos and overwhelms enemy assaulters and supporters with Cero Metralleta.
rows.name: CFYOW Coyote Stark

rows.description: Quilge Opie is the executive hunting captain of the first Jagdarmee of the Wandenreich. He is also a member of the Sternritter with the designation J: The Jail, called Quilge Opie of "the Jail".
rows.name: Quilge Opie

rows.description: Shūhei Hisagi is a tall and lean-built man with dark grey eyes, short black hair and three scars straight over his right eye that lead down his cheek.
rows.name: Shūhei Hisagi

rows.description: Tessai Tsukabishi is an employee of Urahara Shop and a childhood friend of Kisuke Urahara and Yoruichi Shihōin. One hundred years ago, he was the Captain of the Kidō Corps in Soul Society.
rows.name: Tessai Tsukabishi

rows.description: Break Hueco Mondo partner!
rows.name: Shin Zabimaru Renji
